# Smash Bacon

> Smash-burger restaurant inside the Market on 8th food hall in National City,
> California. Orders online are for pickup only — no direct delivery.

- Location: 41 E 8th St #114, National City, CA 91950 (inside Market on 8th)
- Phone: (619) 210-5231
- Hours: Mon–Thu 11 AM–8 PM, Fri–Sun 11 AM–9 PM
- Menu and online pickup ordering: /menu
- Known for: The Original Smash Bacon ($11.99), Double Guac Bacon Jalapeño,
  buffalo chicken burgers and wings, hand-spun shakes with real ice cream
- Prices shown are in-store prices, before tax; lower than delivery apps
- Delivery is available only through third-party partners (DoorDash, Uber Eats,
  Grubhub, Postmates, Seamless, Cash App), at higher menu prices
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/smash.bacon/
